name: Business scraper with contact extraction via Firecrawl and Google Sheets
description: Takes a list of business website URLs, scrapes each with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract contact information (emails, phones, social profiles), saves all business data and contacts to Google Sheets, and posts a summary to Slack.

source.originalName: Google Maps business scraper with contact extraction via Apify and Firecrawl

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping business websites

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving data

businessUrls.description: Comma-separated list of business website URLs to scrape

steps.name: Scrape all business websites with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for contact extraction
Build spreadsheet rows from extracted contacts
Save business contacts to Google Sheets
